message:
📊 acmm: fire ksc_acmm_scanned GA4 event with repo + level (#8496)

Tracks which repos users scan and what level they land at. Fires once
per repo change when scan data arrives (deduped by lastEmittedRepo ref).

Event: ksc_acmm_scanned
Params: repo, acmm_level, detected, total

Visible in GA4 under Events → ksc_acmm_scanned. The 'repo' parameter
answers 'which repos are people scanning' without needing to check
Netlify blob cache manually.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
